subcodes.first_line: Say: Glory be unto Thee, O my God, and glory be unto Thee, O my Heart's Desire! I beseech Thee by Thy Glory in its most glorious splendor, and by Thy sovereignty which encompasseth all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک یا الهی و سبحانک یا مقصودی اسئلک من بهآئک بابهاه و بسلطانک الذی احاط
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
